role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The value of the Shares of the Trust may not reflect the value of the Trust’s SUI, less the Trust’s expenses and other liabilities, for a variety of reasons, including the holding period under Rule 144 for Shares purchased in the private placement, the lack of an ongoing redemption program, any halting of creations by the Trust.
